prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为6293→7380→6040→7909→8354，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2300名；2025年基准约8354名；本省物理类计划2021年83人、2022年84人、2023年84人、2024年84人、2025年87人；2026年计划增至90人，较2025年小幅扩招约3.4%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价中性/混合（主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争 议）；2025年曾发生实习安全事故（偏负面）；抖音热度排名第82（一般），未出现明显报考热度异常信号；无投档断档记录；控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学 与技术A、软件工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配；985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39位区间，属全国顶尖工科强校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与东北大学优势学科方向一致，对考生吸引力较强；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约47.49万，较2025年（约47.25万）略有增加，物理类估 算约26.66万人，竞争基数扩大；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，在江西省招生占比约2.7%（2025年），属跨省就读；东北地区 高校对江西考生存在一定地域距离因素，但985层次仍具较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年计划小幅扩招（+3人）、本省考生总数略增、学校工科优势学科持续吸引高分 考生等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年8354名基础上略有后移；预测最低位次约8557名，区间8057–9057名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 6293 → 7380 → 6040 → 7909 → 8354, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2300 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8354; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 83 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 87 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 90, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (mainly involving the naming dispute of Qinhuangdao Campus); in 2025, an internship safety incident occurred (somewhat negative); Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (average), with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; no record of enrollment gaps; Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding engineering strength highly matching the enrollment majors; 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to a top national engineering powerhouse.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, consistent with Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,500), with Physics Category estimated at about 266,600, expanding the competition base; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, with enrollment in Jiangxi Province accounting for about 2.7% (2025), indicating cross-province study; there is a certain geographical distance factor for Jiangxi candidates regarding universities in Northeast China, but the 985 level still holds strong appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3 students), a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, and the university's strong engineering disciplines continuing to attract high-scoring students, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 8354; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8557, with a range of 8057–9057.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Electronic Science and Technology, Industrial Intelligence)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology College/Zhixing Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Information Security, Virtual Reality Technology)
- Robotics Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Engineering, Vacuum Engineering and Technology, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Design)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Physics, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (Metallurgical Engineering, Environmental Science, Resource Recycling Science and Engineering)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Industrial Engineering, Information Management and Information Systems, Business Administration, Accounting, Marketing, Finance, Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8057–9057, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 8057), prioritize flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation; for rankings near the upper limit (around 9057), use Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Class and Economics and Management Experimental Class as safety options to secure a spot at the 985 platform.
